name: Bodegas de Carmelo
tagline: Interactive showcase of wineries in Carmelo, Uruguay
description: A visually appealing single-page directory showcasing 7 wineries in Carmelo, Uruguay. Features a responsive card grid with hover effects, randomized display order on each visit, and direct links to each winery's website or social media. Built as a promotional tool for the local wine tourism scene.
highlights: Responsive winery card grid with hover effects and external links
Randomized display order for fair winery visibility
Optimized images with next/image for fast loading
